description_long: This doll is modeled as a dark, animatronic bear with a worn, mechanical appearance. Its body is segmented into rounded limbs and torso, with visible metallic joints and exposed wiring protruding from several areas, suggesting damage or age. The head features a wide, toothy grin with sharp metallic teeth, glowing eyes, and a black top hat perched on its head. The doll wears a black bow tie and has a single, round ear on one side, with the other ear partially missing or damaged. The surface is predominantly black with subtle hints of greenish or rusty undertones, and the limbs are jointed, allowing for poseable articulation. The overall look is eerie and mechanical, reminiscent of animatronic characters from horror-themed entertainment venues.
description: A dark, animatronic bear doll with a black top hat, bow tie, exposed wiring, and a mechanical, worn appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's face, toothy grin, glowing eyes, top hat, bow tie, and exposed wiring on limbs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, protruding snout, and visible wiring along the arm and leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the segmented back, rounded limbs, and more exposed wiring, with the top hat visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the mechanical jaw, side of the face, and additional wiring on the arm and leg.
attribute_clothing_style: Classic animatronic style with a black top hat and black bow tie, no visible fabric garments, evoking a formal yet eerie appearance.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with its left arm bent forward and right arm extended outward, left leg slightly bent and right leg extended back, head facing forward.
attribute_facial_expression: The doll has a wide, toothy grin with open mouth, glowing eyes, and a fixed, menacing expression.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; the head is smooth and covered by a top hat.
